description: Calculate the distance from major South American cities to the nearest coastline using the populated places layer (/home/ga/GIS_Data/natural_earth/ne_10m_populated_places_simple.shp) and the coastline layer (/home/ga/GIS_Data/natural_earth/ne_10m_coastline.shp). Filter the cities to include only those in South America and ensure calculations use the South America Albers Equal Area Conic projection (EPSG:102033). Export the results to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/sa_cities_coast_dist.csv as a CSV file containing the city 'name' and the distance to the coastline in kilometers in a field named 'dist_km'.
